svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="3" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="NR0FYjhYRMztpywPgdYQ"> <mxGraphModel dx="766" dy="454" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=22;fontColor=#333333;" value="FRAMEWORK ARCHITECTURE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="500" x="600" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_capture" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#999999;" value="CAPTURE / SETUP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="120" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_res" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#d6b656;" value="RESOLUTION & HEALING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="240" x="120" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="spec" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Playwright Spec
[end-to-end file]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="700" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="builder" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Smart Locator Builder
[role, testId, label,
text, placeholder ...]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="700" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pg" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="PostgreSQL
(locator store)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="1240" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="testreq" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Test request
(resolve element)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="700" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tier1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Tier 1 : DB Primary
stored locator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="700" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tier2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Tier 2 : Smart Locators
(priority ordered set)
first valid & unique" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="700" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tier3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Tier 3 : AI Healing (GPT-4.1)
Azure OpenAI
proposes new locator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="700" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="validation" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Validation
confidence > 0.7
& unique match?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="690" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="healed" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Healed
(persist locator
& continue test)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="1240" y="900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="failterm" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Fail
(throw / report)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="710" y="1100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logger" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Healing Logger
(observes all tiers)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="200" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="context" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Context Extractor
[meta / outerHTML,
minimal full DOM]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="200" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="visual" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Visual Capture
[screenshots]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="200" y="900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_spec_builder" edge="1" parent="1" source="spec" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="builder"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_builder_db" edge="1" parent="1" source="builder" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#82b366;" target="pg" value="seed / store"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_builder_req" edge="1" parent="1" source="builder" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#d6b656;" target="testreq" value="run"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_req_t1" edge="1" parent="1" source="testreq" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#d6b656;" target="tier1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_db_t1" edge="1" parent="1" source="pg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#82b366;" target="tier1" value="lookup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1325" y="575" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_t1_healed" edge="1" parent="1" source="tier1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="healed" value="match ” use it"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1040" y="575" /> <mxPoint x="1040" y="940" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_t1_t2" edge="1" parent="1" source="tier1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#d79b00;" target="tier2" value="fail ” fallback 1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_t2_healed" edge="1" parent="1" source="tier2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#82b366;" target="healed" value="found ” use it"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1150" y="700" /> <mxPoint x="1150" y="940" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_t2_t3" edge="1" parent="1" source="tier2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;" target="tier3" value="fail ” fallback 2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_t3_val" edge="1" parent="1" source="tier3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="validation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_val_healed" edge="1" parent="1" source="validation" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#82b366;" target="healed" value="accept"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_val_fail" edge="1" parent="1" source="validation" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;" target="failterm" value="else fail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ctx_t3" edge="1" parent="1" source="context" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" target="tier3" value="context"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_vis_t3" edge="1" parent="1" source="visual" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" target="tier3" value="images"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="640" y="935" /> <mxPoint x="640" y="830" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_log1" edge="1" parent="1" source="tier1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="logger"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="660" y="575" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_log2" edge="1" parent="1" source="tier2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="logger"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="460" y="830" path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));
